nodes.label: AI as administrative task assistant for scanning and extraction
nodes.label_negative: AI as unnecessary for tasks requiring personal touch
nodes.grounding_span: I use AI to summarize reports to client by scanning the reports

nodes.label: AI efficiency in streamlining tasks and deadlines
nodes.label_negative: AI inefficiency or time waste when no content to extract
nodes.grounding_span: I don't need AI to search for instructions that do not exist

nodes.label: Personal client communication as human domain
nodes.grounding_span: I handle drafting emails to clients on my own

nodes.label: Firm-sanctioned AI use
nodes.grounding_span: It is not yet approved to be used by the firm

nodes.label: AI reliability and accuracy
nodes.grounding_span: a lawyer has used AI and hallucinated cases in their references

nodes.label: Workplace efficiency and productivity
nodes.grounding_span: streamline tasks and due dates by extracting the information from reports

nodes.label: Professional integrity and risk avoidance
nodes.grounding_span: our firm has been skeptical and slow to integrate AI

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI for administrative streamlining
nodes.grounding_span: I have felt satisfied using AI at work when it has successfully helped me streamline tasks

nodes.label: Resistance to AI for client communication
nodes.grounding_span: I don't feel the need to incorporate AI in that aspect of my job

nodes.label: Cautious optimism about future AI integration
nodes.grounding_span: Once our firm is more comfortable using AI, there will be opportunities to streamline tasks

nodes.label: Preliminary assessment before tool engagement
nodes.grounding_span: I make sure to skim the report first before using AI to waste any time
